titleStmt.title: SII 10.288: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 288. (A.R. No. 63 of 1917.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR A WELL IN ĀTMAKŪRU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1160.

summary.p: States that Pālakolani Kēti-Nāyaka built a temple for god Lakshmīśvara at Ātukūru in Doḍḍakaṇḍravāḍi and gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the said temple. Also gives a list of gifts of land made by the same person to the said temple and also to certain Brahmins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīlakṣmīśaḥ pātu vō tāraṁnāyikāṁ
ccōḍicaṁdramākūcāṁbānaṁddanō vīraḥ
kētākhya ssujanāśrayaḥ . śākābdē nabhata
rkarudragaṇitē caitrasya śuddhāṣṭamī dēvā cāryya
nuvāsarē suvinutē mēṣasya saṁkrāṁttayē
śauryyaḥ kākatilakṣmaṇāgratanayaḥ kētākhya
paṁścirā dācaṁdrārkka makhaṁḍḍamaṁḍḍita
ruciṁ lakṣmīśvarāyādarāt . svasti śrī śa
kavarṣaṁbulu 1160 yagu nēṭi caitraśu ddhaA
ṣṭamiyu guruvāramuna pālakolani kētinā
yakuṁḍu doḍḍakaṁḍravāḍilō Ātukūraṁ dama ta
ṁḍri pēra lakṣmīśvara śrīmahādēvaraṁ bratiṣṭasēsi
vimāna mettiṁci sūrebōIni koḍuku māre
bōIni vaśaṁbuna nakhaṁḍadīpamunakuṁ be
ṭṭina modavulu 25 vīniṁ jēkoni muṭū risū
rebōIni koḍku māraṁḍu nitya mā
neṁḍu nēti lekka nācaṁdrārkatāramugā
naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu I bōIniki vritti kha . 1
I dharmaṁ Evvarēni ceṟicinavāru gaṁga ka
ṟuta vēI gavilala vadhiṁcina
bōvaṁ galavāru . I dēvaraku
ku khā . dēvataku khā
kēsavadēvaraku khā mūlastānaṁ dēvaraku
kha2 . dēvanapegaḍaku kha2 . maṁḍamallikhā
junaku kha2 . caṁdrasēkara Appanaṁgaku
khā . veṁḍigaṁṭṭa nagadēvaniki khā . si
ṟṟāvurikēśavamaṁciki khā . nutakimē
ḍepeddiki khā . bhīmarājunaku kha2
raguṁḍa khā prōleAppanaku
khā vāmana Appanaku kha2 Anne peddiki
khā puruṣōttamapeddiki khā
dāmōdara Appanaku khā maṁḍappa
na khā pōtamaṁciki khā guṁḍi
meḍa kaśavuṁḍu khā Īnu
khā (incomplete )
Digital edition of SII 10.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
